touches.ai_summary: Cold call attempt to Parker Koch at CloudSystems. No answer, left voicemail introducing AskElephant's sales productivity platform and mentioning we help IT service companies streamline their sales processes.
next_steps: Follow up with second call attempt

touches.ai_summary: Brief cold call connection with Parker Koch. Introduced AskElephant as a sales productivity tool for SMB sales teams. Parker acknowledged they're currently evaluating solutions in this space and agreed to a follow-up conversation next week.

questions_asked.question: What makes you different from other sales tools we're looking at?
questions_asked.answer: We focus specifically on rep productivity with AI-powered automation that helps your team spend more time selling and less time on administrative tasks.

next_steps: Schedule qualification call for next week

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with case study of similar managed IT company that improved rep productivity by 40%. Parker replied confirming interest and availability for Thursday at 2pm to discuss CloudSystems' current sales process challenges.

questions_asked.question: Do you integrate with our existing CRM stack?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with all major CRMs and can discuss your specific tech stack on our call.

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Parker Koch covering CloudSystems' sales challenges. Team of 8 reps struggling with manual data entry and forecast accuracy. Currently piloting Clari but finding it complex for their team size. Parker is VP of Sales, budget authority unclear. Discussed unlimited automation tier for 3 seats at $2,700 ACV.

questions_asked.question: What are your biggest pain points with your current sales process?
questions_asked.answer: Our reps spend 30% of their time on CRM updates instead of selling. We need better automation and our forecast is all over the place.

questions_asked.question: What's driving you to evaluate sales tools right now?
questions_asked.answer: We're growing fast and need to scale our sales team efficiently. Can't afford to keep hiring without improving productivity first.

questions_asked.question: How does your automation compare to Clari? We've been testing them but it feels overbuilt for us.
questions_asked.answer: We're built specifically for SMB teams. Simpler setup, faster time-to-value, and focused on rep productivity rather than enterprise forecasting complexity.

objections: We're already talking to Clari and they have more features

touches.ai_summary: Product demo originally scheduled was rescheduled by Parker. Demo conducted showing unlimited automation features, activity capture, and AI-powered insights. Parker engaged positively on rep productivity use case. Discussed 3-seat deployment for his core team. Asked about implementation timeline and training requirements. No other stakeholders joined the call.

questions_asked.question: How long does implementation typically take for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 1-2 weeks for initial setup and training. Most SMB customers are fully live within a month.

questions_asked.question: Can we start with 3 seats and expand if it works well?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely. The unlimited automation tier works great for 3 seats, and you can add more seats anytime.

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in evaluating this decision?
questions_asked.answer: Honestly, this is my call to make. I own the sales tools budget and know what my team needs.

objections: I need to compare this against the Clari proposal we received
next_steps: Parker to review internally this week

touches.ai_summary: Sent formal proposal for 3 seats, unlimited automation tier at $2,700 ACV. Included ROI calculator showing estimated 25 hours/month saved per rep. Parker replied asking about contract terms and whether pricing is flexible given the Clari competitive situation.

questions_asked.question: Is this annual only or can we do monthly?
questions_asked.answer: This pricing is for annual commitment. We can discuss monthly but it would be at a higher rate.

next_steps: Discuss contract terms and any pricing flexibility

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email addressing Parker's questions about contract flexibility. Offered quarterly payment terms at the same annual price. Parker responded that Clari came back with a more aggressive discount and he needs to justify the price difference to move forward with AskElephant.
next_steps: Schedule call to discuss value differentiation vs Clari

touches.ai_summary: Email sent with detailed value comparison vs Clari, emphasizing faster time-to-value and SMB-focused approach. Also mentioned we could include extended onboarding support at current price. Parker acknowledged receipt and said he'll make a decision by end of week after discussing with his team.
next_steps: Parker to make final decision by Friday
